title: Slow Dancing in a Burning Room
why_this_song: Slow Dancing in a Burning Room by John Mayer (2006) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "We're going down"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Go cry about it, why don't you?"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Don't you think we oughta know by now?"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "And you know that we're doomed"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "My dear, we're slow dancing in a burning room"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "we're" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "we're" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: It's not a silly little moment
And you know that we're doomed
And you can see it too

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: It's not the storm before the calm
You'll be a bitch because you can
Go cry about it, why don't you?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Slow Dancing in a Burning Room" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Slow Dancing in a Burning Room" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Slow Dancing in a Burning Room", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Slow Dancing in a Burning Room", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Slow Dancing in a Burning Room" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Slow Dancing in a Burning Room" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
